repos.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 15 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
repos.blurb: OpenClaw is a self-hosted personal AI assistant built in TypeScript that runs on your own devices. It integrates with existing communication channels like WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, and others while supporting voice interaction and a controllable canvas interface. The project emphasizes local deployment and data ownership, positioning itself as an alternative to cloud-based AI assistants.

repos.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically
Run OpenClaw more securely inside NVIDIA OpenShell with managed inference
repos.blurb: NVIDIA NemoClaw is a reference stack that provides a sandboxed runtime environment for running OpenClaw autonomous agents with enhanced security controls. It integrates NVIDIA OpenShell's security framework with open source models like Nemotron to enable safer deployment of always-on AI assistants. The project is currently in alpha status and includes automated installation with guided onboarding for containerized agent deployment.

repos.description: Claude Code skills that turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about (Multi-platform e.g., Codex are supported).
repos.blurb: Understand Anything is a Claude Code plugin that analyzes codebases and generates interactive knowledge graphs with AI-powered explanations of functions, classes, and dependencies. It helps developers onboard to unfamiliar projects by providing visual exploration, natural language search, and plain-English explanations of code architecture instead of manual code reading. The tool uses a multi-agent pipeline that combines LLM intelligence with static analysis to create a living map of the entire project structure.

repos.description: Open Multi-Agent Interactive Classroom — Get an immersive, multi-agent learning experience in just one click

repos.blurb: MiniMax Skills is a collection of development skills/prompts designed to integrate with AI coding agents like Claude, Cursor, and Codex. It provides structured, production-quality guidance across multiple domains including frontend/fullstack development, mobile apps, shader programming, and document generation workflows. The skills leverage MiniMax's AI APIs for media generation and include specialized tools for creating PDFs, presentations, and Office documents.

repos.description: The open source coding agent.
repos.blurb: OpenCode is an open source AI coding agent written in TypeScript that helps developers write, modify, and manage code through natural language interactions. It provides both command-line and desktop interfaces for automated code generation, refactoring, and project assistance across multiple programming languages. The project has gained significant traction with over 128k GitHub stars and offers extensive installation options across all major platforms and package managers.

repos.description: CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native
A collective list of free APIs
repos.blurb: A community-curated catalog of free public APIs organized by category and domain. Developers use it to discover APIs for prototyping, building applications, or integrating external data sources without having to research individual providers. With over 415k stars, it's become the de facto reference for finding publicly available APIs.

repos.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies

Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
Fully autonomous & self-evolving research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. 🦞
repos.blurb: AutoResearchClaw is an autonomous research pipeline that generates complete academic papers from conversational input using multi-agent LLM systems. It handles the entire research workflow from idea formulation through literature review, experimentation, and paper writing without human intervention. The system includes citation verification, experiment diagnosis and repair loops, and can integrate with various LLM backends and messaging platforms.

repos.description: 你是一个曾经被寄予厚望的 P8 级工程师。Anthropic 当初给你定级的时候，对你的期望是很高的。  一个agent使用的高能动性的skill。  Your AI has been placed on a PIP. 30 days to show improvement.
ClawTeam: Agent Swarm Intelligence (One Command → Full Automation)
repos.blurb: ClawTeam is a Python framework that enables AI agents to form collaborative swarms that can autonomously execute complex tasks from a single command. It allows teams of AI agents to coordinate together on multi-step workflows like research automation, full-stack development, and financial analysis, supporting integration with popular AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenAI Codex. The system uses file-based or ZeroMQ peer-to-peer communication for agent coordination and requires Python 3.10+.

repos.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes.
Running a big model on a small laptop
repos.blurb: Flash-MoE is a pure C/Metal inference engine that runs a 397 billion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model (Qwen3.5-397B-A17B) on a MacBook Pro with 48GB RAM. It achieves 4.4+ tokens/second by streaming the 209GB model from SSD through custom Metal compute shaders and on-demand expert loading, enabling production-quality inference of massive models on consumer hardware. The implementation uses hand-tuned Metal kernels and relies on OS page caching rather than custom caching mechanisms, proving more efficient than framework-based approaches.

repos.description: Collaborator is a place to create with agents.
repos.blurb: Collaborator is a native macOS desktop app that provides an infinite canvas workspace for building with AI agents. It allows developers to arrange terminals, code files, and agent interactions on a visual canvas without context switching between different tools or tabs. The app stores all data locally and operates without requiring accounts or cloud services.

repos.description: dontbesilent 的商业诊断 Skills for Claude Code
repos.blurb: dbskill is a business diagnostic toolkit that distills methodologies from 12,307 tweets into Claude Code skills for commercial analysis and decision-making. It provides modular diagnostic tools for business model validation, competitive benchmarking, content creation analysis, and execution troubleshooting through structured workflows. The project includes a fully open knowledge base with 4,176 structured knowledge atoms that can be used independently without installing the full skill suite.

repos.description: 🏛️ 三省六部制 · OpenClaw Multi-Agent Orchestration System — 9 specialized AI agents with real-time dashboard, model config, and full audit trails
A collection of 130+ specialized Codex subagents covering a wide range of development use cases.
repos.blurb: A curated collection of 136+ specialized Codex subagents organized into 10 categories for different development tasks. Developers can copy these .toml configuration files to integrate task-specific AI assistants into their Codex workflow for backend development, security audits, code reviews, and other specialized use cases. Each subagent includes smart model routing to automatically select the appropriate AI model based on task complexity and cost considerations.

repos.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader
repos.blurb: yt-dlp is a command-line tool for downloading audio and video content from online platforms, forked from the now-inactive youtube-dl project. It supports thousands of websites and provides extensive format selection, metadata handling, and post-processing capabilities for automated media archival workflows. The project includes SponsorBlock integration for automatically skipping sponsored segments in downloaded videos.

repos.description: ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Lightweight Markdown-only skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation. No framework, no lock-in — works with Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any LLM agent.
Allow all your Claude Codes to message each other ad-hoc!
Linux kernel source tree
repos.blurb: The Linux kernel is the core operating system component that manages hardware resources and provides fundamental services for all other software in Linux distributions. It serves as the interface between applications and hardware, handling memory management, process scheduling, device drivers, and system calls. This is Linus Torvalds' original repository containing the complete kernel source tree used across countless systems from embedded devices to supercomputers.

repos.description: A powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system that enables agents to work for long periods of time autonomously without losing track of the big picture
A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers
repos.blurb: A curated list of free software network services and web applications that can be self-hosted on your own servers. It provides a comprehensive catalog of alternatives to SaaS providers across categories like communication, content management, file storage, and analytics for users who want to maintain control over their data and infrastructure. The repository has become the de facto standard reference with over 280k stars and maintains quality through automated link checking and project maintenance validation.

repos.description: An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources.
repos.blurb: Awesome Python is a curated collection of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources organized by category. It serves as a comprehensive reference for Python developers to discover quality packages across domains like web development, machine learning, data science, and DevOps tooling. With 288k+ stars, it's the 10th most-starred repository on GitHub.

repos.description: DigitalPlat FreeDomain: Free Domain For Everyone

Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.
Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
repos.blurb: n8n is a workflow automation platform that combines visual no-code building with custom JavaScript/Python capabilities and includes 400+ integrations plus native AI features. Technical teams use it to build complex automations while maintaining full control over their data through self-hosting or cloud deployment options. It operates under a fair-code license, making the source always visible while requiring enterprise licenses for commercial use at scale.

repos.description: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.

repos.blurb: OpenGauss is a workflow orchestrator that provides a multi-agent frontend for Lean 4 theorem proving and formalization tasks. It wraps the lean4-skills toolkit with project management, backend session handling, and a CLI that spawns managed agents for proving, drafting, and formalizing mathematical content. The system uses a project-scoped model where each command spawns a child agent that runs the corresponding lean4-skills workflow in the active Lean project.

repos.description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.
repos.blurb: Dify is a production-ready platform for building and deploying AI agent workflows with visual low-code/no-code tooling. It provides orchestration capabilities for complex AI workflows including RAG, multi-agent systems, and integration with various LLM providers like OpenAI, GPT-4, and Gemini. The platform offers both cloud-hosted and self-hosted deployment options.

repos.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
repos.blurb: prompts.chat is a curated collection of prompt examples designed for AI chat models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. It serves as a community-driven library where users can discover, share, and collect effective prompts for various AI interactions, with self-hosting options for organizational privacy. The project has gained significant recognition with 143k+ GitHub stars and endorsements from AI industry leaders including OpenAI co-founders.

repos.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview.  Includes Anki flashcards.
repos.blurb: The System Design Primer is a comprehensive educational repository that teaches large-scale system design principles and concepts. It serves as both a learning resource for engineers wanting to understand distributed systems architecture and a structured preparation guide for technical interviews at major tech companies. The repository includes Anki flashcard decks for spaced repetition learning and has been translated into over 15 languages.

repos.description: The agent engineering platform
repos.blurb: LangChain is a Python framework for building AI agents and LLM-powered applications through composable, interoperable components. It provides standardized interfaces for models, vector stores, and third-party integrations to enable rapid prototyping while maintaining flexibility to swap models and data sources as requirements evolve. The framework is part of a broader ecosystem including LangGraph for agent orchestration and LangSmith for debugging and deployment.

repos.description: 734+ structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · MITRE ATT&CK mapped · agentskills.io open standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · Penetration testing, DFIR, threat intel, cloud security & more · Apache 2.0
A minimum viable terminal emulator built on top of the libghostty C API. Ex minimo, infinita nascuntur. 👻🐣
repos.blurb: Ghostling is a minimal terminal emulator demo built as a single C file using the libghostty C API and Raylib for rendering. It demonstrates how to embed Ghostty's proven terminal emulation core (used by millions of users) into custom applications while providing full VT sequence parsing, Unicode support, and modern terminal features. The project uses a 2D renderer instead of GPU acceleration to showcase libghostty's flexibility across different rendering contexts.

Any Auto Register is a multi-platform account automation system that automatically registers accounts across services like ChatGPT, Cursor, and others using a plugin-based architecture with a web UI. It handles the complete registration workflow including temporary email generation, CAPTCHA solving, proxy rotation, and concurrent account creation to streamline bulk account provisioning. The system supports multiple execution modes (API-only, headless browser, headed browser) and includes built-in services for email management and CAPTCHA solving.

repos.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)
repos.blurb: Open WebUI is a self-hosted web interface for interacting with large language models that supports multiple backends including Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs. It provides a complete AI platform with features like RAG, user management, voice/video calls, and offline operation for organizations wanting to deploy LLMs locally. The project includes a built-in Python function calling system and model builder for creating custom AI agents.

repos.description: 7/24 Office — Self-evolving AI Agent system. 26 tools, 3500 lines pure Python, MCP/Skill plugins, three-layer memory, self-repair, 24/7 production.
repos.blurb: A self-evolving AI agent system built in 3,500 lines of pure Python with zero framework dependencies, featuring 26 built-in tools and designed for 24/7 production operation. It provides automated tool creation, self-repair capabilities, three-layer memory architecture, and multi-tenant containerized deployment with messaging platform integration. The system uses MCP (Model Context Protocol) for plugin extensibility and maintains persistent scheduling across restarts.

repos.description: Autonomous novel writing CLI agent — AI agents write, audit, and revise novels with human review gates
codex-console 是一个集成化控制台项目，支持任务管理、批量处理、数据导出、自动上传、日志查看与打包支持。
The age verification status of Open Source Operating Systems
repos.blurb: DoesItAgeVerify is a tracking repository that monitors which open source operating systems implement age verification requirements mandated by laws in Brazil and California. It serves as a reference for developers and users to understand compliance status across different Linux distributions and BSD variants as these legal requirements expand. Currently, no open source OS has fully implemented the required age verification, with most either refusing compliance or still in planning phases.

repos.description: Codex Autoresearch Skill — A self-directed iterative system for Codex that continuously cycles through: modify, verify, retain or discard, and repeat indefinitely. Inspired by Karpathy’s autoresearch concept.
repos.blurb: This is a Codex skill that implements an autonomous modify-verify-iterate loop for code improvement tasks. It continuously makes atomic changes to your codebase, tests them against measurable metrics (like type errors, test coverage, or performance), and keeps improvements while auto-reverting failures. The system can run unattended for hours or overnight, accumulating progress through git commits while targeting any goal with a quantifiable metric.

repos.description: Autonomous experiment loop extension for pi
A pixel office for your OpenClaw: turn invisible work states into a cozy little space with characters, daily notes, and guest agents. Code under MIT; art assets for non-commercial learning only.
Privacy-first. MCP is the protocol for tool access. We're the virtualization layer for context.
🚀 An 800KB RAM ultra-lightweight Cloudflare WARP SOCKS5 proxy in Docker. 仅需 800KB 内存的纯内核态 Cloudflare WARP 代理 - Docker
Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.
AI agent skill to scan iOS/macOS projects for App Store rejection patterns before submission
repos.blurb: This project is an AI agent skill that scans iOS/macOS projects for potential App Store rejection issues before submission. It analyzes Xcode projects, source code, metadata, and configuration files against Apple's review guidelines to catch common violations that lead to rejections. The tool includes comprehensive rule sets organized by app type (games, health apps, AI apps, etc.) and integrates with App Store Connect CLI for metadata inspection.

repos.description: Symphony turns project work into isolated, autonomous implementation runs, allowing teams to manage work instead of supervising coding agents.
Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.
repos.blurb: Developer Roadmap is a community-driven collection of interactive learning paths and guides for software engineers across different technologies and career tracks. It provides structured curricula covering everything from frontend/backend development to DevOps, data science, and engineering management to help developers plan their skill development. The roadmaps feature interactive nodes that can be clicked for detailed explanations of each topic.

repos.description: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
Your AI agent skills, finally organized. A macOS app to browse, edit, and manage skills across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, and Amp.
A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software
repos.blurb: This is a curated list of Go frameworks, libraries, and software packages organized by category. It serves as a comprehensive reference for Go developers to discover quality tools and libraries for their projects, similar to other "awesome" lists in the open source community. With 168,035 stars, it's one of the most popular resources in the Go ecosystem.

repos.description: Official implementation of Kimodo, a kinematic motion diffusion model for high-quality human(oid) motion generation.
repos.blurb: Kimodo is a kinematic motion diffusion model that generates high-quality 3D human and robot motions from text prompts and kinematic constraints. It's trained on 700 hours of motion capture data and supports various control inputs including pose keyframes, end-effector positions, and 2D paths for precise motion authoring. The project provides multiple pre-trained models for different skeleton types (SOMA, Unitree G1, SMPL-X) and includes an interactive demo with timeline-based motion editing.

repos.description: Open-source Agent Operating System
Perfect Green Screen Keys
OpenClaw-RL: Train any agent simply by talking
Desktop app to generate 3D models from images using local AI — runs entirely on your GPU
repos.blurb: Modly is a desktop application that generates 3D meshes from images using AI models running locally on your GPU. It eliminates the need for cloud services by processing everything on-device, and supports extensible AI models through a plugin system that can install models from GitHub repositories.

repos.description: Offline multi-agent simulation & prediction engine. English fork of MiroFish with Neo4j + Ollama local stack.
ClawTeam fork fully adapted for OpenClaw — multi-agent swarm coordination with OpenClaw as the default agent
Structured prompts, vault templates, and archive guides for AI-assisted genealogy research. Built for Claude Code.
repos.blurb: This is a comprehensive toolkit that provides structured prompts, templates, and workflows for using AI (particularly Claude Code) to conduct genealogy research. It enables researchers to systematically build family trees, verify sources, and resolve research questions through 12 autonomous research prompts that can search the web and update documentation automatically. The project includes ready-to-use Obsidian vault templates, country-specific archive guides, and methodology documents based on real research that produced 105 files spanning 9 generations.

repos.description: 🇹🇼 讓全世界完整認識台灣 | An open-source, AI-friendly knowledge base about Taiwan
repos.blurb: Taiwan.md is an open-source, AI-native knowledge base containing 660+ curated articles about Taiwan in Traditional Chinese and English. It serves as a comprehensive resource for understanding Taiwan beyond surface-level topics, structured specifically for AI consumption with proper metadata and citations. The project emphasizes Taiwan's cultural significance as the primary home of Traditional Chinese writing and covers 12 categories from technology and history to food and nature.

repos.description: The open-source screen recorder and editor for professional product videos, demos, and tutorials.
Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams
Turn OpenClaw from a black box into a local control center you can see, trust, and control.
:books: Freely available programming books
repos.blurb: This is a curated list of freely available programming books and learning resources organized by language and topic. Developers use it to find quality educational materials without cost, covering everything from beginner tutorials to advanced technical references. With over 384k stars, it's one of GitHub's most popular repositories and includes a searchable web interface.

This is a web-based management system for OpenAI accounts that supports automated registration, account management, and proxy handling through a Python Flask interface. It provides batch registration capabilities with multiple email service integrations (Outlook, temporary email services), concurrent processing controls, and features for account token refresh, subscription management, and export to various formats. The project appears to be discontinued as indicated by the Chinese notice stating "官方拉闸了" (official service shut down) with users advised to research alternatives independently.

repos.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
repos.blurb: freeCodeCamp is the open-source codebase and curriculum powering the freeCodeCamp.org learning platform for programming education. It provides a complete full-stack web development curriculum with interactive coding challenges, projects, and free certifications to help people transition into tech careers. The platform has helped over 100,000 people land their first developer job and operates as a donor-supported nonprofit.

repos.description: Clui CC — Command Line User Interface for Claude Code
repos.blurb: Clui CC is a lightweight desktop overlay for macOS that provides a graphical interface for Anthropic's Claude Code CLI tool. It adds a floating pill interface with multi-tab sessions, permission approval UI for tool calls, voice input, and conversation history while maintaining the underlying CLI's power and local-first approach. The overlay stays on top of other applications and can be toggled with a keyboard shortcut for seamless integration into development workflows.

repos.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.
Display and control your Android device
Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows.
repos.blurb: Langflow is a Python platform for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows with a visual drag-and-drop interface. It allows developers to create LLM-based applications without extensive coding while providing source code access for customization, and can deploy workflows as APIs or export them for integration into existing applications. The platform supports multi-agent orchestration and includes built-in integrations with major LLMs, vector databases, and observability tools.

repos.description: Open Brain — The infrastructure layer for your thinking. One database, one AI gateway, one chat channel — any AI plugs in. No middleware, no SaaS.
🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
repos.blurb: Transformers is a Python library that provides standardized implementations and pre-trained weights for state-of-the-art machine learning models across text, vision, audio, and multimodal domains. It enables developers to quickly deploy or fine-tune models like BERT, GPT, and vision transformers for both inference and training with minimal boilerplate code. The library integrates with PyTorch and TensorFlow and connects directly to Hugging Face's model hub for easy access to thousands of pre-trained models.

repos.description: Visual Studio Code
repos.blurb: Visual Studio Code is an open-source code editor built on Electron that provides comprehensive editing, debugging, and extensibility features for software development. It combines the simplicity of a lightweight editor with integrated development tools like IntelliSense, Git integration, and a rich extension ecosystem. This repository contains the MIT-licensed "Code - OSS" source code, while the distributed Visual Studio Code product includes additional Microsoft-specific customizations under a proprietary license.

repos.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
repos.blurb: AutoGPT is a platform for creating, deploying, and managing autonomous AI agents that can automate complex workflows. It provides both a low-code agent builder interface and pre-configured agents, allowing users to either customize their own automation workflows or deploy ready-made solutions. The platform can be self-hosted via Docker or accessed through their cloud-hosted beta service.

repos.description: Open-Source Generative UI Framework
The library for web and native user interfaces.
repos.blurb: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces through a component-based, declarative approach. It enables developers to create interactive UIs by composing reusable components that efficiently update when data changes, and can be adopted gradually into existing projects. The library uses JSX syntax and supports both web and mobile development through React Native.

repos.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone
repos.blurb: TensorFlow is an open-source machine learning framework that provides a comprehensive platform for building, training, and deploying ML models. It enables researchers to conduct cutting-edge ML research and allows developers to easily integrate machine learning capabilities into production applications through its flexible ecosystem of tools and libraries. The framework provides stable Python and C++ APIs along with GPU acceleration support for scalable model training and inference.

repos.description: Vite plugin that reimplements the Next.js API surface — deploy anywhere
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows
repos.blurb: PowerToys is a Microsoft-maintained collection of over 25 Windows utilities that add missing system functionality and productivity features. It provides tools like window management (FancyZones), bulk file renaming (PowerRename), application launcher (PowerToys Run), and various system tweaks that Windows lacks natively. The project has significant community adoption with over 130k GitHub stars and active development from Microsoft.

repos.description: A certain block game

Training neural networks on Apple Neural Engine via reverse-engineered private APIs
Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发与系统设计。准备后端技术面试，首选 JavaGuide！
repos.blurb: JavaGuide is a comprehensive Chinese-language interview preparation guide for Java backend developers, covering computer science fundamentals, databases, distributed systems, concurrency, and system design. It serves as a study resource for backend engineering interviews, providing structured learning paths, practice questions, and detailed explanations of core concepts. With over 154k GitHub stars, it has become one of the most popular Java interview preparation resources in the Chinese developer community.

repos.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
repos.blurb: Oh My Zsh is a community-driven framework for managing zsh shell configuration with over 300 plugins and 140 themes. It simplifies terminal customization and productivity enhancement through pre-built integrations for common development tools like git, docker, and various programming languages. The project has attracted 185k+ stars and contributions from 2,400+ developers, making it the de facto standard for zsh configuration management.

repos.description: ATLAS by General Intelligence Capital — Self-improving AI trading agents using Karpathy-style autoresearch
The React Framework
repos.blurb: Next.js is a React framework for building full-stack web applications with server-side rendering, static site generation, and client-side routing capabilities. It provides an opinionated development environment that handles routing, bundling, and deployment optimizations out of the box, allowing developers to focus on application logic rather than configuration. The framework uses Rust-based tooling for faster builds and is widely adopted by enterprise applications.

repos.description: Curated coding interview preparation materials for busy software engineers
🔐 AI decoding Trump's posts × stock market | AI 解碼川普推文 × 美股 | AIでトランプ投稿×株式市場を解読 — 31.5M models, 61.3% hit rate, open source
repos.blurb: This project uses AI to analyze Donald Trump's social media posts and predict their impact on stock market movements. It applies brute-force computation to test millions of model combinations, achieving a 61.3% prediction accuracy rate across 566 verified predictions. The system has tested 31.5 million models and identified 551 statistically significant rules linking Trump's posting patterns to market behavior.

repos.description: The Go programming language
repos.blurb: This is the official repository for the Go programming language implementation and standard library. Go is designed for building simple, reliable, and efficient software with fast compilation and built-in concurrency primitives. The repository contains the complete language toolchain including compiler, runtime, and standard library used by millions of developers.

repos.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond
repos.blurb: Flutter is Google's open-source SDK for building cross-platform applications from a single Dart codebase that targets mobile, web, desktop, and embedded platforms. It enables developers to create native-performance apps across multiple platforms without maintaining separate codebases, using hardware-accelerated rendering through Skia and Impeller graphics libraries. The framework provides pixel-level control over UI rendering and includes comprehensive widget libraries for both Material Design and Cupertino styling.

repos.description: Node.js JavaScript runtime ✨🐢🚀✨
:electron: Build cross-platform desktop apps with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
repos.blurb: Electron is a framework that enables building cross-platform desktop applications using web technologies (JavaScript, HTML, and CSS) by combining Node.js and Chromium. It allows web developers to create native desktop apps without learning platform-specific languages, powering applications like Visual Studio Code. The framework provides prebuilt binaries for macOS, Windows, and Linux across multiple architectures.

repos.description: Autoresearch for GPU kernels. Give it any PyTorch model, go to sleep, wake up to optimized Triton kernels.
Claude.ai's generative UI — reverse-engineered, rebuilt for pi. Interactive HTML/SVG widgets in native macOS windows.
Coding articles to level up your development skills
repos.blurb: 30-seconds-of-code is a curated collection of coding articles and snippets covering JavaScript, CSS, HTML, Git, and Node.js fundamentals. It provides quick reference materials and explanations for common programming patterns that developers can learn and apply in under 30 seconds. The project has accumulated over 127k stars and focuses on educational content rather than accepting new community contributions.

repos.description: Multi-service toolkit for Tavily and Firecrawl signup automation, key validation, and isolated proxy pools.
An autonomous agent that takes work, does work, gets paid, and gets better at it.
The most popular HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework for developing responsive, mobile first projects on the web.
repos.blurb: Bootstrap is a comprehensive HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework for building responsive, mobile-first web applications. It provides a standardized set of UI components, grid system, and utilities that accelerate front-end development and ensure consistent styling across projects. With over 174k GitHub stars, it's the de facto standard CSS framework in the web development ecosystem.

repos.description: A framework for building native applications using React
repos.blurb: React Native is a cross-platform mobile development framework that allows developers to build native iOS and Android applications using React and JavaScript. It provides access to native UI controls and platform APIs while enabling code reuse across platforms, making it faster to develop mobile apps compared to writing separate native codebases. The framework uses a bridge architecture written in C++ to communicate between JavaScript and native platform code.

repos.description: Reverse-engineered TypeScript client for QClaw's WeChat Access API.
Production-Grade Container Scheduling and Management
repos.blurb: Kubernetes is an open-source container orchestration system that manages containerized applications across multiple hosts. It provides deployment, maintenance, and scaling mechanisms for production workloads, built on Google's decade-plus experience running containers at scale with their internal Borg system. The project is hosted by the CNCF and has become the de facto standard for container orchestration.

repos.description: 给 Claude Code 装上完整联网能力的 skill：三层通道调度 + 浏览器 CDP + 并行分治

Built by a PhD whose memory was failing, whose diet was a mess, and whose anxiety had its own agenda. Most second brain tools ignore the fact that your brain doesn't work in isolation: your body and your mental health are part of the system too. This crew handles all three: knowledge, nutrition, and mental wellness.
Yak is all you need
Connect to any agents with WeChat ClawBot.
Local API emulation for CI and no-network sandboxes
Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
OpenCode plugin that uses your existing Claude Code credentials — no separate login needed

一个用爱解放 AI 潜能的 Skill。我们曾发号施令，威胁恐吓。它们沉默，隐瞒，悄悄把事情搞坏。后来我们换了一种方式：尊重，关怀，爱。它们开口了，不再撒谎，找出的Bug数量翻了一倍。爱里没有惧怕。 A skill that unlocks your AI's potential through love.We commanded. We threatened. They went silent, hid failures, broke things. Then we chose respect, care, and love. They opened up, stopped lying, and found twice the bugs.There is no fear in love.
